title: Changed: Origins
description: Adds Compatibility and Transfurs to mod Origins
body:
This Origin Compatibility Bridge for Changed: Minecraft Mod

This add-on fully integrates Origin-style selection with the Changed mod's transfur system. Choose your starting form

Core Features

Permanent Forms: Origins with "Genetic Lock-in" cannot be reverted by standard cures. Only Litix-Camonia Fluid can undo these deep-bonded infections. Laether Syringes and Unifusers will fail.

Overwrite System: "Malleable Biology" Origins are instantly overwritten when consuming a different transfur source—no cooldown, no resistance.

Ability Mapping: Feline Leap costs food, Exp2 Dodge teleports behind attackers, Carry works on villagers, Dissolve sets quicksave points at health cost, Wings Flap enables aerial dashes, and Psychic Pulse reflects projectiles. All mapped directly from Origin descriptions to Changed mod abilities.

Game Rule Integration

Do Latex Infection: Rapid tick-based infection makes Malleable Biology Origins transform within seconds.

Creatures Diet: Cat Origins prefer fish, Sharks prefer aquatic food, Wolves prefer meat—eating wrong food provides no hunger restoration.

Fight to Keep Your Conscience: Minigame available to all transfurred Origins. Failure causes permanent memory loss.

Do Boss Transfur Permission: Prevents accidental selection of Experiment 009 or Experiment 010 as starting Origins without admin approval.

Item Compatibility

Hazard Armor (0.5 transfur resistance): Equippable only by Not Infected and Unstable Hybrid Origins. Genetic Lock-in Origins cannot wear it.

Dark Latex Coat + Cap: Confuses Beasts for all Origins. Wearing both prevents Dark Latex entities from attacking.

Painite (Y -55, Netherite pick required): All Origins can mine. Used as expensive trade item with villagers.

Iridium (Y -55, Diamond pick required): Upgrades Unifuser and Catalyzer. Reinforces White Walls against breach attempts.

New Transfurs as Origins (Post-2.5.4)

Latex Snow Fox (Male/Female)

BioSyth Snow Leopard (Male/Female)

Puro Kind (Male/Female)

Buny

All include unique ability sets. Puro Kind gains Carry and Dissolve. Buny gains Dodge and Psychic Pulse.

Craftable Untransfur Items - Survival Integration

Laether Syringe: Instantly untransfurs without side effects. Does NOT work on Genetic Lock-in Origins.

Litix-Camonia Syringe: Instant untransfur with chance of failure. Repeated use causes side effects. Works on Lock-in at 5% success rate.

Litix-Camonia Pot: Slowly untransfurs over time. Drinking milk OR timer reaching zero stops the process. Not recommended for Lock-in Origins.

Litix-Camonia Fluid: Converts infected blocks AND players into solvent that removes infection. The ONLY reliable method for Genetic Lock-in reversal. Requires Unifuser or Catalyzer to craft.

Grab Mechanics Compatibility (Pre-2.5.4)

Friendly Grab: Heals both transfurred and human players. Requires both to activate friendly modes by right-clicking. Works across all Origins.

Assimilation: Converts human player into transfur player, strengthening the transfur. Cannot be used on Genetic Lock-in Origins (they are already at maximum bond depth).

Normal Grab: Infects human player while retaining their conscience. Conscience retention chance based on Origin type—Unstable Hybrid has highest retention (80%), Genetic Lock-in has 0% (conscience is already gone).

Friendly Transfur: Transfur player requests consent from human player before transformation. Compatible with all Origins except those with "Total Cellular Conversion" (they cannot consent—they are already converted).

New Attributes

Transfur Resistance: Reduces infection progress each tick. Default maximum progress is 20. Values above 1 are more potent. Not Infected Origin starts with 0.5. Genetic Lock-in Origins have 0.

Transfur Infection: Causes infection damage each tick. Malleable Biology Origins take double damage from new infection strains.

Latex Solvent Damage Multiplier: Affects attacks against latex entities. Unstable Hybrid Origins gain 1.5x multiplier due to their partial latex nature.

New Structures and Loot

Experiment 009 Facility: Contains chests with loot, lore pieces, and Exp9 DNA fragments. Use DNA to craft Spawn Egg for Experiment 009 boss. Compatible with all Origins.

Experiment 010 Facility: Contains mid/good loot, lore pieces, and Exp10 DNA fragments.

Meteor Facility: Submerged meteor structure. Contains rare ores and Litix-Camonia Fluid sources.

Achievements for Origin Players

Transform into an Organic Form: Unlocked by choosing any non-Latex Origin (Shark, Dragon, or any Organic transfur)

Craft the Unifuser/Catalyzer: Available to all Origins. Required for crafting untransfur items.

Craft and use Untransfur items: Not available to Genetic Lock-in Origins (they cannot use untransfur items on themselves—only others can use Fluid on them)

Activate Friendly Mode: Available to all Origins. Unlocks healing grab mechanics.

Survive Genetic Lock-in: Hidden achievement. Unlocked by remaining sane for 100 days as a Lock-in Origin without attempting reversion.

Technical Notes

Requires Changed mod latest version 

Requires Minecraft Forge 1.20.1

Untransfur items are not canonical to Changed lore but are included for survival gameplay balance

Genetic Lock-in Origins are intended for hardcore players who want permanent consequences

"Un-MCreator" cleanup in progress—codebase being refactored from MCreator auto-generation to proper Forge standards

FAQ - Origin Specific

Q: Can I change my Origin after starting? A: Only if you have Malleable Biology. Consume a different transfur source to overwrite. Genetic Lock-in Origins cannot change.

Q: My Genetic Lock-in Origin won't revert. Is this a bug? A: No. This is working as intended. Use Litix-Camonia Fluid or accept your new form.

Q: Can I play as Experiment 009 as an Origin? A: Only with Do Boss Transfur Permission enabled and admin approval. Otherwise disabled for balance.

Q: Do Dark Latex Puddles affect Origin selection? A: Puddles indicate nearby Dark Latex entities regardless of Origin. Dark Latex Coat + Cap confuses Beasts for all Origins.

Discord Support
Join for Origin compatibility help, bug reports, and "un-MCreator" development: https://discord.gg/nR9RkW2A47
